cmd.app_tour_done: Waxa la bilaabay tusniinta — adeegso Soco si aad u marto.
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Ku xaqiiji sanduuqa si aad u tirtirto jawaabahaaga.
cmd.clear_workspace: Tirtir wax walba oo cusub bilow
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Waxa la saaray waxa hadda jira iyo taariikhda — marka hore weeydiin
cmd.create_lesson_done: Waxa la bilaabay habka cashar oo ku saabsan “
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot ayaa ku hagaya talaabooyinka xiga.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Waxa la bilaabay habka cashar oo hagaysa — AlloBot ayaa ku weeydiin mowduucaaga.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Wuxuu bilaabaa habka hagaysa — sheeg mowduuc iyo fasal
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Soo mar diiran, sepia, madow, dyslexia-saaxiib, iyo kuwo kale
cmd.export_pack_done: Waxa la diyaarinayaa soo dejinta xirmada casharka…
cmd.font_reset_done: Cabbirka qoraalka waxa loo celiyay caadiga.
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Ku socodsii falanqayn isha qoraalka hadda jira
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Ka samee tixraac erayo qoraalka hadda jira
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Ka samee qaab-dhismeed qoraalka hadda jira
cmd.generate_quiz_done: Waxa la samaynayaa imtixaan qoraalka tani…
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Ka samee imtixaan qoraalka hadda jira
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_hint: Ka samee qaab-jumlado qoraalka hadda jira
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Samee heer akhris fudud — sheeg “ilaa fasalka N” si aad u doorato
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Ku baro tixraacaan sida tujto kaarar degdeg
cmd.open_class_session_done: Sanduuqa fadhiga fasalka waa la furay.
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Bilow ama ku biir fadhi fasal toos ah
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Dhis oo soo dejiso dukumeenti kala duwan
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Xarunta Macallinka waa la furay — kaarka Document Pipeline wuxuu u dhow yahay sare.
cmd.open_export_menu_done: Liiska soo dejinta waa la furay.
cmd.open_lumen_done: Lumen ayaa la furay STEM Lab.
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Waraysi qof AI ah oo ku saabsan mowduucaan
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: Mashruuc-mashruuc AI, qoraalka codka, iyo xayiraadda Socratic
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Qalab is-dhexgal ah oo sayniska & xisaabta
cmd.open_submission_inbox: Fur sanduuqa shaqada la soo gudbiyay
cmd.open_submission_inbox_done: Sanduuqa shaqada la soo gudbiyay waa la furay.
cmd.open_submission_inbox_hint: Dib u eeg shaqada ardaydu soo gudbiyeen
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Qaybta Soo Dejinta — PDF-ka calaamadaysan waa nuqulka diyaarka u ah wadaagista.
cmd.pipeline_downloads_hint: Wuxuu u dhaqaaqaa qaybta Soo Dejinta
cmd.pipeline_fix_again: Mar kale ku socodsii hagaajinta helitaanka
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_done: Waxa la socodsiinayaa mar hagaajin oo kale…
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Mar hagaajin oo kale si loo kordhiyo dhibcaha
cmd.pipeline_issues_hint: Wuxuu ku hadlaa arrimaha hadhay ee sare
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Waa la tirtiray — soo geli dukumeenti cusub si aad u bilowdo.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Tirtir natiijadan oo soo geli fayl cusub
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Wuxuu ku hadlaa hadda hortii → kaddib
cmd.pipeline_stop_done: Waxa la joojinayaa marka wareegga hadda dhammaado.
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Jooji marka wareegga hadda dhammaado — waxa la haystaa waxa la sameeyay
cmd.read_this_page_done: Akhriste boggu waa la furay — dooro halka aad ka bilaabto.
cmd.submit_work_done: Waxa la furayaa sanduuqa soo gudbinta…
cmd.switch_theme_done: Midabka waa la beddelay — soo mar iftiin, kaddib madow, kaddib kala-soocid sare.
cmd.switch_theme_hint: Soo mar iftiin → madow → kala-soocid sare
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Waxa la furayaa sanduuqa oggolaanshaha isku-xirka daruurta — ku xaqiiji halkaas si aad u shidato.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Isku xir shaqadaada daruurta (markii hore oggolaansho weeydiin)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Soo mar midab jilicsan oo bogga dul saaran
cmd.toggle_dictation_hint: Ku hadal halkii aad qori lahayd
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Habka caawimaada waa la beddelay — guji xakamayn kasta si aad uga barato.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Guji wax walba si aad u barato waxa uu sameeyo
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Xariiq hage ah oo dhaqaaqa oo raadraac
cmd.toggle_socratic_hint: Saaxiib waxbarasho oo su'aal hore dhiga
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_hint: Calaamado sawir ah oo qoraalka la jira
cmd.translate_document_done2: oo waxa la iftiimiyay batoonka — riix Turjun si aad u socodsiiso. (Turjumaadu waxay isticmaashaa hadhaaga AI, sidaa darteed gujinta adigaa iska leh.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Hore u buuxiya luqadda oo tilmaamaya batoonka
cmd.translate_document_pick: Waxa la iftiimiyay xakamaynta turjumaadda — dooro luqad oo riix Turjun.
cmd.undo_settings: Ka noqo beddelkii dejinta ugu dambeeyay
cmd.undo_settings_done: Waxa la soo celiyay dejintaadii hore (haddii ay jirtay beddel laga noqdo).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Soo celi dejintii casharka hore (ma aha waxa la sameeyay)
cmd.voice_start_done: Xakamaynta codka waa shid. Sheeg amar sida “qoraal weyn” ama “fur xarunta macallinka”. Sheeg “jooji dhageysiga” si aad u dhammeyso.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot wuxuu dhageystaa amarrada ilaa aad joojiso
cmd.voice_stop_done: Xakamaynta codka waa dami — makarafoonka waa la sii daayay.
cmd.zen_on_done: Habka zen waa shid — riix Ctrl+K oo socodsii “ka bax zen” si aad u soo noqoto.
palette.confirm: ⚠ Mar kale riix Enter si aad u xaqiijiso
palette.footer: Falkasta waa la ku dhawaaqaa. Ctrl+K ayaa beddela.
palette.no_match: Amar u dhigma ma jiro. Sheekada bot-ka (codka dhowaanna) wuxuu fahmaa codsiyo bilaash ah.
cmd.set_ui_language_done: Waxaan ku tilmaamay doorashada afka ee madaxa — halkaas ka dooro afkaaga.
cmd.set_ui_language_miss: Doorashada afka isticmaalka waxay ku taal sharaxa menu ee sare.
cmd.open_allo_studio_hint: Nashqadee boostaro, waraaqo faafin iyo waraaqo shaqo oo la heli karo
cmd.open_cinematic_studio_hint: Samee hordhacyo filim ah iyo muuqaallo sharraxaad
cmd.open_lingua_practice_hint: Ku celceli erayada iyo luuqadda isha hadda jirta
cmd.open_open_groove_done: Open Groove Studio waa la furay.
cmd.open_open_groove_hint: Samee garaacis, hannaan synth iyo muusik garanaya qoraalka muusikada
cmd.open_test_prep_hub_done: Test Prep Hub waa la furay.
cmd.open_test_prep_hub_hint: Fur xirmooyin layli bilaash ah iyo qalab waxbarasho
cmd.open_timeline_studio_hint: Dhis oo hubi khadadka waqtiga ee la heli karo
cmd.open_video_studio_hint: Duub, qoraal ku dar oo tafatir muuqaallo hagitaan
